items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
L❤ewe Hammock new size 'Beige Lychee'
Hammock is a versatile bag with a soft side body, allowing you to release the sides to change its shape. The ring strap allows for multiple carrying styles. This new compact version is crafted from soft grained calfskin.
Crossbody, shoulder, or top handle
Detachable, adjustable shoulder strap
Internal hook closure
Two internal slip pockets, one external zip pocket
Customizable with shoulder strap and personalized charms
Herringbone cotton canvas lining
Anagram embossing
Model: 3813
Size: 19.5×14.5×20cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
🔥 New Puzzle Hobo is a soft and refined short Nappa leather shoulder bag 👜 Inspired by the Puzzle bag's rectangular shape and unique geometric lines, it starts with looks and stays true to the leather, especially the softness of the puzzle hobo which is stunning 🎀 The colors are super nice, stylish and versatile, cool yet sweet, really amazing, I love it 😻 Classic Nappa leather, soft and delicate to the touch~ The geometric design is really durable and can be carried for a long time 💚 Short shoulder strap, one external zip pocket and one interior pocket ✨ Leather zip pull, D-ring to connect personalized charms 🔗 Chevron cotton canvas with Anagram embossing 🛍️
Dimensions: 28CM~10CM~5.5CM
Style No.: 8018
Color: Moss Green

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
🔥 Medium calfskin Anagram Tote handbag, linen patchwork tote features💥 No flashy designs, simple and practical type🌻 The design of the long and short shoulder straps looks quite good, the size is quite suitable, not too big🌹 Easily meets daily needs. In addition to the regular classic shoulder strap😻, it also features a unique woven handle❤️, adding a lot of stylishness and design sense to the simple look. The bag body is embossed with the iconic Anagram logo🌺, the recognizability and fashion sense are spot on😘, and it is comfortable and photogenic😍. Can be used with a longer calfskin top handle or a shorter handmade woven handle🌼. This size version is made of calfskin👜. The front is decorated with a large Anagram💋. "Carried by shoulder or top handle". Calfskin strap fastening* Two internal slip pockets*Calfskin lining⭐️
Dimensions: 29CM~25CM~14CM
Style No.: 9300 Full Leather
Color: Beige Berry

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Cotton jacquard Puzzle Fold Handbag
Linen natural color 1762b
Inspired by the geometric lines of the brand's classic handbags, the Puzzle Fold Handbag is reinterpreted with geometric architectural patchwork, fully foldable, making it a perfect travel companion. The brand uses creative ingenuity to create a soft and lightweight bag, paired with a low-key and elegant LOEWE logo. This version is made of cotton jacquard.
Crossbody or handheld
Synthetic leather lining
LOEWE embroidery
215.5-31cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Crossbody bag White
Loє❤️wє New Arrival, the ultimate crossbody bag!
A must-have for fashionistas to look cool when going out~
The viral Puzzle-derived puzzle hobo!
Once it appeared, it made many bag lovers want one
The puzzle hobo inherits the classic geometric bag shape
Overall more slim and slender
The wide shoulder strap looks more high-end and stylish
Great for both hand-carry and shoulder carry!
Don't let its size fool you
The softness of Nappa calfskin
Makes the bag lightweight and incredibly spacious
Super practical for daily wear, excellent!
size:29*12*10cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine Leather
NEW IN
Small Goya Silk Calfskin Handbag
7 Colors
Model 5609 Dimensions 19-13.5-6
The Goya is a structured bag that is very well organized for its size. The clean Anagram closure and vibrant colors contrast sharply with its sharp graphic minimalism. It is handcrafted from exquisite silk calfskin with a soft Nappa sheepskin lining. It embodies exquisite craftsmanship and is a new LOEWE product worth adding to your collection.
Shoulder carry
Adjustable shoulder strap
Magnetic closure
Four interior pockets, including a zip pocket and a snap pocket
One exterior pocket
Calfskin lining
Metal-embossed LOEWE logo on the strap
